notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Elly De La Cruz steals (10) 2nd base. Elly De La Cruz to 3rd. Elly De La Cruz advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Chadwick Tromp.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Will Benson doubles (3) on a line drive to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr. Spencer Steer scores. Fielding error by right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed

notableEvents.label: Eli White pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eli White flies out to right fielder Will Benson.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski singles on a line drive to left fielder JJ Bleday. Dominic Smith to 2nd.
